name: evergreen
description: Ships read-only impact discovery, passive evidence and source maps, reversible Claude/Codex install, doctor, and uninstall, trusted CI semantics, and generalized release identity checks.

interface.shortDescription: Keep docs and release versions honest
interface.longDescription: Proves documentation drift, ranks impact candidates from passive evidence, and audits package, CLI, documentation, and Apple release identity.
defaultPrompt: Check whether my docs and release version still match the code.
Find documentation impact candidates before I edit changed paths.
